description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named AppImage that runs on pull requests and on push to the master branch or tags matching v*. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to build AppImages for x86_64 and aarch64 architectures on ubuntu-24.04. It checks out the repository with submodules, installs dependencies, builds the AppImage, deploys it to a staging directory, uploads the build as an artifact, and creates a GitHub release for continuous builds or tags.
